message:
refactor(robot): extract Get* functions for CLI/REST parity

Split Print* functions into Get* (data retrieval) and Print* (formatting)
to enable REST API responses with the same data the CLI displays.

Changes by file:
- ensemble.go: GetEnsembleStatus returns structured ensemble state
- ensemble_spawn.go: GetSpawnSuggestion returns spawn plan without printing
- ensemble_stop.go: GetStopPlan returns stop candidates without printing
- ensemble_suggest.go: GetSuggestion returns recommendation data
- robot.go: Minor refactoring to support Get* pattern
- robot_dashboard.go: GetDashboardData returns dashboard metrics

This follows the established CLI/REST parity pattern from the
GetSnapshotDelta/GetTriage/GetRoute refactors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
